education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Applied Science

roles.description:
Built data-intensive activity pages, advanced filtering systems, reporting modules, and core admin tools using Angular and Django, optimizing performance for large datasets. (Matific - Teacher Site)
Developed serverless microservices with AWS Lambda and a Rust PoC for high-performance computation, reducing operational costs.
Increased unit test coverage to 90%+, enhancing reliability and regression safety.
Worked with global cross-functional teams (Mobile, Unity, Content, ML/AI, Support) to resolve production issues and improve integrations.
Contributed to company-wide UI component migration, improving consistency and maintainability.
Delivered an Accessibility-compliant product version under tight deadlines for European and North American markets.
Built a RAG-based AI agent using LangChain to assist backend support teams in troubleshooting customer issues without requiring developer intervention.
Migrated the frontend client application (internal) from Angular to React to improve performance and maintainability.
roles.title: Senior Software Engineer

roles.description:
Developed and maintained core functionality for the company’s B2B web platform, prioritizing performance, reliability, and usability.
Built Angular-based WordPress widgets, migrated components to Web Elements, and deployed scalable Docker-Kubernetes infrastructure with NGINX.
Mentored junior developers, conducted productivity workshops, and hosted ongoing developer forums to enhance team learning.
roles.title: Senior Software Engineer

roles.description:
Migrated Angular 7 applications to Angular 9; contributed to front-end modules for B2B travel functionalities (Supplier, Insurance, Generic).
Developed internal project management tools integrating Jira and GitLab APIs; built reporting modules for management insights.
Improved B2C travel platform (FlyDubai) booking flows and UI performance.
roles.title: Software Engineer

roles.description:
Developed a full-stack Leave Management system for the enterprise social network (Kriyo.net).
Contributed to chatbot features, reporting modules, bug fixes, and overall application improvements.
roles.title: Trainee Software Engineer

projects.description:
An R&D project I developed at Matific. It is an AI-powered assistant designed to help support staff understand the logic behind product functionalities without needing to consult developers, especially when handling new or complex customer issues.

Built using LangChain, a vector database, text embeddings, and OpenAI LLMs.
projects.name: RAG-based Knowledge-based Assistant

projects.description:
A project I built for my wife. It is a collection of tools designed to support her day-to-day work at school and private classes.

The system includes AI-powered features to assist with her teaching career, such as generating new Physics problem ideas, simplifying complex concepts, and helping create structured lesson plans.
projects.name: A/L Physics Teacher Assistant + Class Scheduler

projects.description:
Designed and developed a full-stack admin portal to manage companies, clients, projects, and contracts with documents upload and manage.
Architected the system end-to-end and delivered it to production within 4 months as a part-time freelance project.
Built with NestJS, Angular, AWS S3, NX monorepo, Typescript
projects.name: Planflex - Admin Portal for a Construction Consultancy Company

projects.description:
Final-year university project; an augmented reality application
The application was designed to help visitors navigate large buildings by providing real-time, AR-based
indoor guidance and directional assistance.
Built with Unity and iOS ARKit.
projects.name: AR-based Indoor Navigation Guide

summary:
Software developer focused on building clean, maintainable, and scalable systems across the full stack. Strong interest in distributed systems, system architecture, and designing reliable software across frontend and backend systems. Passionate about exploring open-source projects to understand engineering patterns and architectural trade-offs.
Committed to efficiency, reliability, and automation, with a strong focus on improving developer productivity and long-term maintainability. Hands-on experience with modern AI technologies, including agent-based systems and MCP/RAG implementations, applying them to rapidly evolving development workflows.
